Careers Candidate home navigation should not become job data

Product Security Engineer

Remote - United States

Meridian Cloud is hiring a Product Security Engineer to partner with engineering teams, review application architecture, build secure development guardrails, and improve incident readiness.

You will work with TypeScript, Go, Kubernetes, AWS, CI/CD automation, threat modeling, and vulnerability management. This full-time remote role requires strong communication skills and experience protecting modern SaaS platforms.
